mapper.sql: p.project_id, p.name, p.department_id, d.name AS department_name, p.owner_id, u.full_name AS owner_name, p.status, p.start_date, p.end_date
FROM project p JOIN department d ON d.department_id = p.department_id JOIN users u ON u.user_id = p.owner_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project (project_id, name, department_id, owner_id, status, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{name}, #{departmentId}, #{ownerId}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET status = 'ARCHIVED' WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
